title: 4 Pack 60 Inch in/mm Retractable Tailors Measuring Tape for Sewing Craft Hobby
description:
The Tailors Tape is a simple but essential tool for sewing, crafts, and other general purposes; it never hurts to have an extra one handy as they are used so frequently. This particular unit features non-stretch, soft and flexible fiberglass fabric tape with contrasting increments in red. The vivid red color of the measurements provides a great contrast against the white background to ensure that you're getting the most accurate measurement possible. The lightweight plastic case is just 2 inches in diameter. Push the red button to retract the tape back into it's case. Measurements are in inches on one side and uses the metric system on the other.
